ops.title: Suppress codex exec event log from bash results
ops.description: Every codex exec streams its full event log (banner, echoed prompt, progress) into the Bash tool result even though -o "$R" writes the answer. Redirect stdout+stderr to a scratchpad JSONL log (--json --color never), surface only REPLY_FILE:/LOG_FILE: lines (or a failure tail -20). Wrapper gains the currently-missing REPLY_FILE echo in the same edit.

ops.text: every codex exec line in SKILL.md + codex-wrapper.md carries -o, --json, --color never, and a 2>&1 redirect; invariant test extended to enforce it
live smoke: Bash tool result reduces to REPLY_FILE:/LOG_FILE: lines and the reply file holds the answer
failure path: bad config surfaces the log tail in the tool result
